productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Vanquish 5 White Sports Shoes
description: Offering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas Vanquish 5 M makes for a fabulous running shoe, offering breathable comfort and abrasion resistance mile after mile. For those who love to dress with a sporty style, this shoe also makes for a great casual wear. Upper Heavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfort Synthetic leather overlays with high-visibility blue adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structure Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorption Anatomically engineered footbed which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Litestrike EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with circular lugs for absolute grip and traction Impact guidance line for better shock distribution and enhanced energy return Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
